name: tmemory
description: Persistent brain for Claude sessions — serverless architecture. v3.2: Singleton pattern (Brain.get_instance), brain.absorb() for merging knowledge from relearned brains, Hebbian edge creation fix (co_accessed auto-discovery), LLM-based relearning simulation, pre-filter + batch + parallel optimization, temporal lambda fix. Features: Python-native brain module (direct SQLite), FastEmbed embeddings, density-based gap detection, graph-based knowledge with semantic + TF-IDF recall, emergent bridging, time-dilated decay, auto-suggest, pre-response recall (Layer C).
